overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's vibrant downtown district. The player moves past futuristic neon-lit buildings, crosses intersections, and navigates under elevated highways in a vividly colored cyberpunk environment with heavy Japanese architectural influences.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown boulevard with dedicated bike lanes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of a wide futuristic street toward a distinctive spiral tower landmark

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with large orange 'TURBO' signage and teal accents
tall cylindrical tower with spiral neon lighting and multiple holographic displays wrapping around its facade
massive concrete overpass structure visible in the distance spanning across the street
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide sunlit street in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The camera moves forward along red-painted bike lanes toward a prominent spiral tower. The Turbo building sits on the left with vibrant signage, while palm trees and modern skyscrapers line the right side. Sparse pedestrians and vehicles populate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crossing leading to covered pedestrian walkway

events.description: crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk at the intersection
turning right onto the sidewalk and entering the covered area beneath the elevated highway

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right to follow a pedestrian in a gray suit onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in gray business suit walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: building with green and red facade featuring 'KIROSHI' signage and pink neon accents
broad yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
massive concrete support pillars and underside of the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the yellow-striped intersection and turns right onto a sidewalk. The spiral tower moves to the left as the scene transitions under the elevated highway. The Kiroshi building with its distinctive green and red facade comes into view on the left. The camera follows a pedestrian in a gray suit into the increasingly shaded environment beneath the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily under the overpass past various storefronts and neon signs

entered.detail: series of shop fronts with glowing neon signs and digital displays under the overpass
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street
large blue building with pink structural elements visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the massive concrete overpass, the scene is characterized by mixed lighting with shadows from the highway above. Storefronts with neon signage line the left side while a green railing separates the walkway from the traffic on the right. The blue plaza building becomes visible ahead as the Kiroshi building recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved sidewalk around blue commercial building with holographic advertisements

events.description: turning left around the corner of the blue building with pink pillars

agents.ego_description: navigating around the curved corner of the blue building while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in black jacket walking in the opposite direction around the corner

entered.detail: large cylindrical pink support pillars with yellow stripes wrapping around the blue building corner
large digital advertisements including a pink 'ALL IN' sign and character portraits on the blue building wall
line of parked futuristic cars along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the camera turns left around a striking blue building adorned with massive pink pillars and vibrant holographic advertisements. The 'ALL IN' billboard dominates the left side as pedestrians walk in opposing directions. Parked vehicles line the right side of the street while the elevated highway remains visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sunlit boulevard into the shaded depths of an urban overpass before emerging into a neon-saturated plaza. It begins by gliding along red-painted bike lanes toward a prominent spiral tower, passing the vibrant signage of the Turbo building and palm-lined skyscrapers. As the camera crosses a yellow-striped intersection and turns right, the environment shifts from open sunlight to the heavy shadows beneath an elevated highway, following a pedestrian past the green and red facade of the Kiroshi building. The scene then progresses through this concrete corridor, where neon storefronts and green railings line the path until the blue plaza building appears ahead. Finally, the camera emerges from the shade and turns left around a striking blue structure with massive pink pillars and holographic advertisements, with the "ALL IN" billboard dominating the view as the highway recedes into the background.
